zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe於1212年出生在英國薩默塞特塞頓 蒙迪斯時，她的父親Simon de Lulworth18歲，母親Eve Ritter17歲。她於1233年與William de Montacute在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1260年在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古享年48歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthe于1212年出生在英国薩默塞特塞頓 蒙迪斯时，她的父亲Simon de Lulworth18岁，母亲Eve Ritter17岁。她于1233年与William de Montacute在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1260年在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古享年48岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。

nameMeanings.name: Berthe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe was born in 1212, in Sutton Montis, Somerset, England, her father, Simon de Lulworth, was 18 and her mother, Eve Ritter, was 17. She married William de Montacute in 1233, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1260, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe est née en 1212, à Sutton Montis, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Lulworth, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Eve Ritter, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William de Montacute en 1233, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1260, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe 1212 in Sutton Montis, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Lulworth 18 und ihre Mutter Eve Ritter 17. Sie hat 1233 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England William de Montacute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England und wurde in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe è nata il nel 1212 nel Sutton Montis, Somerset, England, sua padre, Simon de Lulworth, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Eve Ritter, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William de Montacute nel 1233, nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1260, nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Shepton Montague, Somerset, England.

ja.Wincanton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトウィンカントン

ja.lifeSummary: Bertheが1212年にイギリスソメルセトスットオン モンティスで生まれた時，父Simon de Lulworthは18歳，母Eve Ritterは17歳であった。1233年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでWilliam de Montacuteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1260年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーで48歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthe(이)가 1212년 영국 서머세트 수턴 몽이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Lulworth(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve Ritter(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1233년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 William de Montacute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe nasceu em 1212, em Sutton Montis, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Lulworth, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Eve Ritter, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Montacute em 1233, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1260, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe родилась в 1212 г. в местности суттон монтис, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon de Lulworth было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve Ritter, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Montacute в 1233 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1260 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthe nació en 1212, en Sutton Montis, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Lulworth, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Eve Ritter, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William de Montacute en 1233, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1260, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra.
